full_text:
10 likes, 2 comments - weekday.works on June 12, 2026: "Forward deployed engineer might be the most interesting job in AI right now.
An AI startup wants someone who can sit between engineering, product, and the customer.
- Embed with clients and build self-improving AI agent workflows
- High ownership, real travel, and a direct line to the founders
📍Bengaluru, ₹40 - 60 LPA, 2+ years
